corrections_timeline.title: AASTeX acknowledgments syntax compliance
corrections_timeline.issue: Deprecated AASTeX acknowledgment command can break manuscript checks.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Formatting compliance risk is reduced; no direct Branch C/D metric impact.

corrections_timeline.title: CP bound terminology and explicit storage
corrections_timeline.issue: Zero-hit null experiments need explicit binomial upper bounds.
corrections_timeline.change: Refereeproof suite computes Clopper-Pearson upper bounds and stores `p_upper_95*` fields.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Null proximity claims are bounded conservatively when hits=0.

evidence.value: def clopper_pearson_upper(k: int, n: int, alpha: float = 0.05) -> float:

corrections_timeline.title: Null vs control relabeling
corrections_timeline.issue: Within-bin shuffle can be misinterpreted as a destructive null.
corrections_timeline.change: Suite A2 is explicitly labeled `structure_preserving_control` and annotated as not a null test.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Interpretation avoids false evidence inflation from a control expected to give p≈1.

evidence.value: Within-bin shuffle preserves the conditional distribution p(y|x) by construction. It is NOT a null test; p≈1 is the expected outcome. This control confirms that the scale preference resides in the global x-y correlation, not in bin-local structure.

corrections_timeline.title: Added destructive bin-aware null (A2b)
corrections_timeline.issue: Global and galaxy-shift nulls alone do not isolate cross-bin composition effects.
corrections_timeline.change: Suite A2b block-permute-bin destructive null added with dedicated output fields.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Shows intermediate proximity rates (`p_within_0p10_dex=0.158`), refining null interpretation.

corrections_timeline.title: Dual-window proximity (±0.05/±0.10 dex)
corrections_timeline.issue: Single-window proximity can hide scale-local sensitivity.
corrections_timeline.change: Dual-window proximity function emits both ±0.05 and ±0.10 dex hit fractions and p-values.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Improves discrimination between tight and broad scale concentration under null.

corrections_timeline.title: SPARC path resolver + dataset rebuild hash change
corrections_timeline.issue: Legacy-path drift could drop SPARC coverage and shift pooled residual statistics.
corrections_timeline.change: Unified pipeline adds path resolution/guardrails and emits stamped metadata; dataset hash changed from backup `430a75f2...` to restored `11742ae3...`.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Branch C headline changed materially: pooled shift from ~0.184776 dex (older run) to ~0.027282 dex (restored hash-locked run).

corrections_timeline.title: galaxy_key canonicalization and default SS20 exclusion
corrections_timeline.issue: Mixed galaxy naming and SS20 single-point stubs can distort pooled-point analyses.
corrections_timeline.change: Bridge pack canonicalizes `galaxy_key` and excludes `SS20_*` by default unless opt-in.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Improves grouping integrity; report explicitly shows excluded SS20 points.

corrections_timeline.title: Meta stamping + enforce-hash execution guardrails
corrections_timeline.issue: Unstamped runs allow silent dataset drift.
corrections_timeline.change: Pipeline writes `rar_points_unified.meta.json` with output SHA/git head; bridge and Branch C scripts enforce `require_csv_sha` checks.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Run provenance is auditable and hash-locked.

corrections_timeline.title: Regression tests for SPARC presence floors
corrections_timeline.issue: SPARC depletion can silently pass unless explicitly tested.
corrections_timeline.change: Regression test enforces minimum SPARC points and galaxy-key counts in loader and unified CSV.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Protects Branch C/D against recurrence of SPARC-missing drift.

corrections_timeline.title: Branch entrypoints + provenance scan guardrails
corrections_timeline.issue: Cross-repo leakage and wrong-CWD execution can invalidate provenance.
corrections_timeline.change: Dedicated Branch C/D entrypoints enforce repo-root checks and run-stamp sidecars; provenance scanner reports BH references.
corrections_timeline.scientific_effect: Improves reproducibility and auditability of execution context.

evidence.value: Scan bec-dark-matter for potential provenance leakage from bh-singularity.
- Vendoring recommendation: **no vendoring required** (no identical-hash matches found).
